The player (green object) was at approx (50, 33). After one `UP` action, I need to check if it moved.
Looking at the image, the green object is still at the bottom.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare player position before and after the UP action
def get_player_pos(frame):
    nodes = frame.segmentation['nodes']
    for node in nodes:
        if node['color'] == 'N':
            rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
            return (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
    return None

pos_before = get_player_pos(previous_frame)
pos_after = get_player_pos(current_frame)
print(f"Player position before: {pos_before}")
print(f"Player position after: {pos_after}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
